scenarios.name: Flip reclaim & hold
scenarios.invalidation_note: Back below ~29090 with momentum / failed hold
scenarios.why: Leaving the hinge reduces forced dealer sell-the-rip. Local corridor GEX +157.94M (±1k). Pain/magnet sit overhead.
scenarios.management: Scale 1/2 into first +GEX/pain; trail under higher lows if flow wakes bullish.

scenarios.name: Flip reject / downside expansion
scenarios.trigger: Failure at flip and acceptance below ~29085–29045
scenarios.why: Chain net GEX -57.04M with short-gamma local regime. Nearest fuel nodes: 28000, 28500, 28800.
scenarios.management: Do not average into acceleration; cover partials into −GEX shelves (28.8k/28.5k/28k).

scenarios.name: Hinge chop / mean-test
scenarios.trigger: Price holds inside 0DTE 1σ with repeated tests of flip / max pain; flow still quiet
scenarios.invalidation_note: Impulsive break beyond 1σ with rising live flow shift or corridor GEX flip
scenarios.why: Pin quality is weak (27/100). NQ flow=no_flow; prefer structure over magnet fades.
scenarios.management: Fade edges only with tight stops; stand down if VIX pops while GEX stays negative.

scenarios.name: Neg-GEX air pocket ride
scenarios.trigger: Break/hold under 28000 (−GEX shelf) with expanding range
scenarios.why: Negative gamma nodes can act as fuel on the way down until a larger put wall absorbs.
scenarios.management: Intraday only; size down — short gamma days gap through levels.

scalp_checklist: Mark gamma flip as the regime line — acceptance matters more than wicks.
Trade the flip corridor + 0DTE 1σ + nearest ±GEX shelves first; remote 28k/30k walls are context unless extended.
Read local corridor GEX (±500/±1000), not only chain net GEX — far OTM call walls can mask a short-gamma hinge.
If flow is no_flow, settled GEX is boss until contracts_with_flow rises.
Weak pin (<40) = do not fade solely because of magnet; wait for structure + volume.
Watch OI builds on puts below (support/fuel) vs calls above (ceilings).
Short gamma: reduce size into impulsive breaks; never average losers into acceleration pockets.
Cross-check QQQ (cash 0DTE) and NDX regime — disagreement = smaller size / wait.
VIX rich ≠ calm when net/local GEX is negative — premium can stay bid while NQ trends.
Re-pull lean stack after major acceptance away from flip or if spot leaves the 1σ envelope.
